title: Design a non-exhaustive domain error
scenario: Domain errors should name business-rule failures without mentioning databases, HTTP, or UI details.
instructions: Define CreateOrderError with EmptyOrder and InvalidQuantity. Derive thiserror::Error, add concise messages, and mark the public enum #[non_exhaustive] so new variants remain a compatible API change.

hints.body: Public error enums often gain variants over time.
Use #[non_exhaustive] to force downstream wildcard handling.
Use thiserror for the Display and Error implementations.

completionExplanation: The domain error is typed, readable, and designed for API evolution.
